text:
Author's Note

Translation

In order to get some inspiration for this series, I went around interviewing survivors of WWII who had experience in the front lines of battle.
Out of the various chaotic stories people would tell me that videos or documents could not even come close to, one person averted their eyes onto the table and simply said: "Movies about war and such, I just don't watch them."
That one phrase really left an impression on me.

Chapters Included

Chapter 58
Chapter 59
Chapter 60
Chapter 61

Synopsis

From the back of the volume: 

"The horrors of the Ishvalan campaign occurred years before Ed became a State Alchemist, and had serious repercussions, which set the tone for the complicated dealings of present-day state politics. Lieutenant Hawkeye reluctantly tells Ed all the dread details of the role Colonel Mustang and the other state alchemists played in the tragic event."
